summary: Created DuckDB call analytics dataset for The Vibe Pill hotline at Datasets/vibe-pill-calls/. 6 tables: calls (13 cols, member-identified with pathway/outcome tracking), member_profiles (11 cols, phone PK, tier/engagement tracking), applications (8 cols, membership funnel pipeline), escalations (6 cols), feedback (6 cols), daily_analysis (13 cols). Ingest script supports VAPI webhook payloads, member upserts, escalation/feedback/application logging, and --dry-run mode. Schema.yaml, datapackage.json, and README.md all created following zo-hotline-calls conventions adapted for membership context.
broadcast: DuckDB path: Datasets/vibe-pill-calls/data.duckdb. Tables: calls, member_profiles, applications, escalations, feedback, daily_analysis. Ingest script at Datasets/vibe-pill-calls/ingest/ingest.py.
